mapper.update: UPDATE videos SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{videoId} AND like_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT v.*, vc.name as category_name FROM videos v LEFT JOIN video_categories vc ON v.category_id = vc.id WHERE v.status = 1 ORDER BY v.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT v.*, vc.name as category_name FROM videos v LEFT JOIN video_categories vc ON v.category_id = vc.id WHERE v.status = 1 ORDER BY v.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 END) as pending_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 END) as published_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 END) as rejected_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN uploader_type = 1 THEN 1 END) as user_upload_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN uploader_type = 2 THEN 1 END) as admin_upload_count FROM videos
